scenario.name: MESSAGE
scenario.send:
MESSAGE sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: alice <sip:alice@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: bob <sip:bob@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 MESSAGE Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: text/plain Content-Length: [len]
hello-from-sipp
